series_metadata.series_description: Contains permanent inventory of real estate holdings of the department as well as records of acquisitions, sales, transfers, donations, easements or rights of way, department transfers, Articles of Dedication, environmental covenants, leases, and other long-term real estate transactions. The series may include, without limitation, records such as deeds, easements, transfers, long-term leases, property descriptions, surveys, plats and maps, appraisals and valuations, title examinations, journal entries, Attorney General Opinions, work requests, life estate documents, and correspondence. Records may be maintained in several formats that may include databases, microform, spreadsheets, paper files, image and data files, and reports such as ODNR’s Annual Real Estate Inventory Report.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent. ; Paper: Permanent. If scanned microform or electronic format, paper copies may be archived or destroyed
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Archives
